evidence.verification: structured diff smoke script verifies CodePanel diff rendering, file IO wiring, ContextPanel open-code dispatch, and page integration

proposed_change.description: Mark the structured diff display feature as HAVE with promotion evidence after passing the structured diff smoke test and preserving identity, persona, session, transcript, and persist continuity.
proposed_change.diff:
--- a/frontend/src/app/page.tsx
+++ b/frontend/src/app/page.tsx
@@
+import { CodePanel } from '@/components/CodePanel';
+import { CoworkPanel } from '@/components/CoworkPanel';
@@
+      <CoworkPanel />
+      <CodePanel />
--- a/frontend/src/components/ContextPanel.tsx
+++ b/frontend/src/components/ContextPanel.tsx
@@
- onRead(node.path)
+ window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('karma-open-code', { detail: { path: node.path } }))
--- a/frontend/src/components/CodePanel.tsx
+++ b/frontend/src/components/CodePanel.tsx
@@
+ load file
+ edit content
+ save content
+ render structured diff preview
